message:
fix(e2e): correct aria-label selectors for filter chip removal buttons

The component uses "Remove category filter: {category}" format, not
"Remove {category} filter". Updated regex patterns to match actual
aria-labels:
- /remove ideation filter/i → /remove category filter.*ideation/i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
